topics.title: Host Confronts Producer Over Dinner Etiquette
topics.summary: The studio reacts to a heated debate regarding the host's decision to leave a dinner party early and the subsequent backlash from listeners.

topics.title: Wedding Etiquette and Thank You Notes

topics.summary: The studio discusses the delay of wedding thank-you notes, personal anecdotes regarding a car ride, and the evolving landscape of satellite versus terrestrial radio.

topics.title: Engagement Party Logistics and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores the dynamics of a recent engagement party, discussing personal exhaustion, local Pittsburgh highlights, and the logistics of social gatherings.

topics.title: Spider-Man 3 and Chris Cornell Cover

topics.title: Tobey Maguire's Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio explores Tobey Maguire's experiences filming the Spider-Man trilogy, his past struggles with substance abuse, and his personal life including his engagement and childhood in show business.

topics.title: Toby Maguire Interview

topics.title: Spider-Man 3 Promotion and Superhero Comparisons
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Tobey Maguire regarding his role in Spider-Man 3, his fitness journey, and a humorous debate over which superhero would win in a fight.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores various topics including superhero tropes, television shows like Heroes and Battlestar Galactica, and the media controversies surrounding figures such as Bernard Kerekes.

topics.title: Gilbert Gottfried's Marriage and Career
topics.summary: The studio features Gilbert Gottfried discussing his recent marriage, the upcoming birth of his child, and his perspectives on media controversy and professional tenure.

topics.title: Gilbert Gottfried Interview and Roast Promotion
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Gilbert Gottfried regarding his career, public image, and a discussion about upcoming roast details.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Guest Previews
topics.summary: The studio hosts a game to award tickets for an upcoming roast, discusses celebrity news involving Drew Barrymore and Georgia Fox, and previews upcoming segments featuring Gilbert Gottfried and various guests.

topics.title: Pop Culture Commentary and Film Recitations
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on American Idol contestants, the physical appearance of George W. Bush, and various segments of classic cinema including The Godfather.

topics.title: Old Hollywood Anecdotes and Immigration News
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on classic television figures, the history of horror films like Frankenstein, and reports on immigration rallies in Chicago.

topics.title: Controversial Language and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the NAACP's symbolic funeral for the N-word, followed by segments on Iraq war policy, climate change skepticism, and celebrity news.
